title: Codereview pass 2: SCHC Ack.to_bytes RFC compliance
description: Independent general subagent review of the fragment.py edit for project-LICHEN-ntx4. Check for RFC 8724 8.3.3 exact match on bit-packed W/C and conditional bitmap (no n on complete). Verify test oracles are independent. File any P0-P2 findings as child beads parented to project-LICHEN-ntx4. No comments added per style. Mimic existing style. Check test integrity.
close_reason: Pass 2: no P0-P2 issues found. Confirmed independent oracles in tests (hardcoded bytes computed from RFC bit fields, not derived from impl). Conditional bitmap implemented correctly; complete ACKs are exactly 2 bytes. from_bytes robust for both paths. All tests (fragment + reassembly) pass with pytest. No dead code or comments added.
